profile.name: Ridhima Nanda
profile.tagline: Computer Engineering student building scalable web applications.
profile.bio: Computer Engineering student at Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology focused on software engineering and full-stack web development. I enjoy solving problems with C++, building responsive web applications, and continuously improving through real-world projects, hackathons, and collaborative development.

projects.title: The Neighbourhood Fan Page
projects.subtitle: Responsive fan website
projects.description: A responsive fan page dedicated to The Neighbourhood, built to practice modern frontend development. Focused on clean UI, responsive layouts, and creating an engaging user experience.

projects.title: SafePulse AI
projects.subtitle: ACM Hackathon Project — AI-Powered Healthcare Triage & Emergency Response System
projects.description: A smart healthcare triage platform that assists emergency response by analyzing patient symptoms, prioritizing cases, and providing real-time monitoring through an interactive dashboard.
